MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF GE RETAIL BANK/PAYPAL EXTRAS MASTERCARD'S Motion For Change Of Venue is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Los Angeles County. Plaintiff to pay transfer costs. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Continued To Dec-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF GE RETAIL'S Motion For Change Of Venue is continued to December 19, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 9, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
